notes: Designed for Vertex AI Veo 3.1 generation with GCS-hosted PNGs.
Each scene generates an individual clip. Concatenation is done locally with ffmpeg (optional).
Set env vars PROJECT_ID, OUTPUT_GCS_URI_BASE, OUTPUT_LOCAL_DIR, optionally LOCATION, MODEL_ID, DURATION_SECONDS(4|6|8), ASPECT_RATIO, POLL_SECONDS.
